_comment: Approximate provider pricing in USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Indicative only — VERIFY against current provider pricing before relying on cost estimates. The estimator prints the exact projection for the selected provider/model. Local Ollama is $0 marginal cost (electricity only). Cursor is usage-based (agent), not token-exact: treated as an upper-bound estimate.

cursor._note: Usage-based agent billing, not token-exact. Estimate is a conservative upper bound using a sonnet-class rate.

codex._note: Codex CLI (codex exec) signed in with ChatGPT: metered against your ChatGPT plan quota, not per-token billed here. No marginal USD; watch your ChatGPT/Codex usage dashboard.

claude._note: Claude Code (claude -p) with CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: drawn from your Claude plan's monthly Agent SDK credit pool (separate from interactive chat, as of 2026-06-15), not per-token billed here. No marginal USD; watch your Claude usage dashboard.
